content.problemStatement:
It is the end of 2019 — the 17th of November, the Cooking Challenge day.

There are NNN players participating in this competition, numbered 111 through NNN. Initially, the skill level of each player is zero. There are also MMM challenges (numbered 111 through MMM). For each valid iii, the iii-th challenge has three parameters LiL_iLi​, RiR_iRi​ and XiX_iXi​ with the following meaning: for each player between the LiL_iLi​-th and RiR_iRi​-th inclusive, if this player participates in this challenge, their skill level increases by XiX_iXi​ (XiX_iXi​ does not have to be positive).

The organizers of the Cooking Challenge decided that the contest would be boring if they let the participants participate in the challenges directly, so they decided to use the compos.

There are QQQ compos (numbered 111 through QQQ). For each valid iii, the iii-th compo has two parameters AiA_iAi​ and BiB_iBi​, which means that it includes the challenges Ai,Ai+1,…,BiA_i, A_i+1, \ldots, B_iAi​,Ai​+1,…,Bi​.

Each participant has to select a subset of the compos (possibly empty or the set of all QQQ compos) and participate in all challenges those compos include. A participant may not select the same compo twice, but may participate in the same challenge more than once if it is included in multiple chosen compos.

For each player, find the maximum skill level this player can reach if the compos are chosen optimally.
constraints: 1≤Li≤Ri≤N1 \le L_i \le R_i \le N1≤Li​≤Ri​≤N for each valid iii
1≤Ai≤Bi≤M1 \le A_i \le B_i \le M1≤Ai​≤Bi​≤M for each valid iii
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 1,000,0001,000,0001,000,000
the sum of MMM over all test cases does not exceed 5,0005,0005,000
the sum of QQQ over all test cases does not exceed 50,00050,00050,000
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains three space-separated integers NNN, MMM and QQQ.
MMM lines follow. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines contains three space-separated integers LiL_iLi​, RiR_iRi​ and XiX_iXi​.
QQQ more lines follow. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines contains two space-separated integers AiA_iAi​ and BiB_iBi​.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing NNN space-separated integers. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these integers should denote the maximum skill level of the iii-th player.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1:

The first player will select the 333-rd compo.
The second and third players will not select any compo.
The fourth player will select the 111-st, 222-nd and 444-th compos.
The fifth player will select all the compos.
